messages.content: please revise the sentences for me. Cells expressing Cbf5-FH were harvested by centrifugation and resuspended in buffer S containing protease inhibitor tablets
After centrifugation, the cells expressing Cbf5-FH were collected and subsequently suspended in buffer S containing protease inhibitor tablets.

We excised the gel slices and extracted RNAs from the bands using RNA elution buffer (300 mM sodium acetate pH 5.5, 1 mM EDTA, 0.25% SDS, and 100U/mL RNasin (Promega; N2615)), which was left overnight at 22°C with gentle rocking. RNA was added with 1μL of GlycoBlue (Invitrogen, AM9515) and an equal volume of isopropanol. The mixture was then incubated at -80°C for 3 hours and precipitated by centrifugation at 15,000 rpm and 4°C for 30 minutes. After washing twice with 75% ethanol, the pelleted RNA was dried in air and resuspended in diethylpyrocarbonate (DEPC)-treated water.

To extract RNAs from the bands, we excised the gel slices then used RNA elution buffer (composed of 300 mM sodium acetate at pH 5.5, 1 mM EDTA, 0.25% SDS, and 100U/mL RNasin from Promega; N2615) which was left to incubate overnight with gentle rocking at 22°C. Next, we added RNA together with 1μL of GlycoBlue from Invitrogen (AM9515) and an equivalent volume of isopropanol. The resulting mixture was then incubated at -80°C for 3 hours and precipitated through centrifugation at 15,000 rpm and 4°C for a duration of 30 minutes. After washing twice with 75% ethanol, we dried the pelleted RNA in air then suspended it in diethylpyrocarbonate (DEPC)-treated water.

RNA was dephosphorylated with Quick CIP (NEB; M0525S) and T4 polynucleotide kinase (PNK) (NEB; M0201S), then precipitated with isopropanol and further resuspended. After 5’-phosphorylation using T4 PNK, we extracted the RNA with phenol/chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1, pH 5.2). We constructed RNA sequencing libraries using our adaptors and primers (Wu 2020) and the NEBNext Multiplex Small RNA Library Prep Set for Illumina (E7300S, NEB).

To dephosphorylate the RNA, we used Quick CIP (NEB; M0525S) and T4 polynucleotide kinase (PNK) (NEB; M0201S), which was then further precipitated with isopropanol and resuspended. To perform 5’-phosphorylation, we used T4 PNK, followed by RNA extraction with phenol/chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (25:24:1, pH 5.2). Subsequently, we constructed RNA sequencing libraries using our adaptors and primers (Wu 2020) along with the NEBNext Multiplex Small RNA Library Prep Set for Illumina (E7300S, NEB).
The cDNA was then ligated using T4 RNA Ligase 1 (NEB; M0204) in the presence of ATP with 3’ DNA adaptors overnight at 25°C.
We proceeded to ligate the cDNA using T4 RNA Ligase 1 (NEB; M0204), together with ATP and 3' DNA adaptors, overnight at 25°C.
L7Ae was subsequently loaded onto two serial HiTrap Blue HP columns in 20 mM MES buffer and ultimately eluted in a salt gradient.
To load L7Ae, we used two serial HiTrap Blue HP columns with 20 mM MES buffer and eluted the protein using a salt gradient.
Ψ-fc is amount to log10(Ψ-ratio of CMC-treated RNA/ Ψ-ratio of untreated RNA).
The Ψ-fc value is calculated as the log10 of the Ψ-ratio of CMC-treated RNA divided by the Ψ-ratio of untreated RNA.

The 5' end of read 1 that corresponds to the 3' end of cDNA is counted, as well as the read coverage. Ψ-ratio is calculated for each position as 5' end counts/read coverage at +1 position. Ψ-fc is amount to log10(Ψ-ratio of CMC-treated RNA/ Ψ-ratio of untreated RNA).

For each position, the 5' end of read 1 is counted as it corresponds to the 3' end of cDNA, along with the read coverage. The Ψ-ratio is then calculated for each position by dividing the 5' end counts by the read coverage at the +1 position. The Ψ-fc value is obtained by taking the log10 of the Ψ-ratio of CMC-treated RNA divided by the Ψ-ratio of untreated RNA.
For analysis, we performed RNA-seq and mass spectrometry on both the IP and gel-purified RNPs.
To conduct an analysis, we conducted RNA-seq and mass spectrometry on both the IP and gel-purified RNPs.
Next, we performed RNA-seq and mass spectrometry on both the IP and gel-purified RNPs.
Next, we carried out RNA-seq and mass spectrometry on both the IP and gel-purified RNPs.
